title: Missing Names
story_intro: The villagers have forgotten the names of everyday people, places, animals and things. Help restore the missing names.
completion_message: You helped the villagers remember everyday names!

title: Special Names
story_intro: Important names across the kingdom have disappeared from maps, letters and signs. Restore the special names.
completion_message: The kingdom's special names shine again!

title: One & Many
story_intro: The Counting Bridge is damaged. Help sort things into one and many to repair the bridge.
completion_message: The bridge is repaired and travelers can cross safely.

title: Strange Plurals
story_intro: A wizard's spell has scrambled unusual words. Help fix magical words that refuse to follow normal rules.

title: Team Trouble
story_intro: Groups throughout the kingdom have become separated. Help reunite animals, people and objects into their teams.
completion_message: The kingdom's teams are together again.

title: Magic Workshop
story_intro: Builders have forgotten what things are made from. Help rebuild the kingdom's workshop.
completion_message: The workshop is buzzing with activity again.

title: Family Tree
story_intro: The Royal Family Tree has lost its labels. Help reconnect family and friend relationships.
completion_message: The family tree is complete once more.

title: Invisible Treasures
story_intro: The kingdom's most valuable treasures cannot be touched or seen. Discover hidden treasures like courage, kindness and joy.
completion_message: You uncovered the kingdom's invisible treasures.

title: Ownership Island
story_intro: Objects across the island have lost their owners. Help return every item to the correct person or animal.
completion_message: Every treasure has found its rightful owner.
